description: Creates a resilience-managed service with associated systems, input sources, assertions, and service functions.

ServiceArn.markdownDescription:
The ARN of the service.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Pattern: ^arn:(aws|aws-cn|aws-iso|aws-iso-[a-z]{1}|aws-us-gov):[A-Za-z0-9][A-Za-z0-9_/.-]{0,62}:([a-z]{2}-((iso[a-z]{0,1}-)|(gov-)){0,1}[a-z]+-[0-9]):[0-9]{12}:[A-Za-z0-9/][A-Za-z0-9:_/+.-]{0,1023}$  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

Name.markdownDescription:
The name of the service.

---

Required: Yes  
Type: String  
Pattern: ^[A-Za-z0-9][A-Za-z0-9_\-]{1,59}$  
Update requires: Replacement

Description.markdownDescription:
The description of the service.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Maximum Length: 615  
Update requires: No interruption

items.markdownDescription:
---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Pattern: ^[a-z]{2}-((iso[a-z]{0,1}-)|(gov-)){0,1}[a-z]+-[0-9]$  
Update requires: No interruption

Regions.markdownDescription:
AWS regions for the service.

---

Required: Yes  
Type: Array  
Update requires: Replacement

AssociatedSystems.markdownDescription:
Systems associated with this service.

---

Required: No  
Type: Array  
Update requires: No interruption

PolicyArn.description: The ARN of the resilience policy to associate.
PolicyArn.markdownDescription:
The ARN of the resilience policy to associate.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Pattern: ^arn:(aws|aws-cn|aws-iso|aws-iso-[a-z]{1}|aws-us-gov):[A-Za-z0-9][A-Za-z0-9_/.-]{0,62}:([a-z]{2}-((iso[a-z]{0,1}-)|(gov-)){0,1}[a-z]+-[0-9]):[0-9]{12}:[A-Za-z0-9/][A-Za-z0-9:_/+.-]{0,1023}$  
Update requires: No interruption

DependencyDiscovery.markdownDescription:
Dependency discovery state.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Allowed Values: ENABLED | DISABLED | INITIALIZING  
Update requires: No interruption

InputSources.markdownDescription:
Input sources for this service.

---

Required: No  
Type: Array  
Update requires: No interruption

Assertions.markdownDescription:
Assertions associated with this service.

---

Required: No  
Type: Array  
Update requires: No interruption

Tags.markdownDescription:
Tags assigned to the service.

---

Required: No  
Type: Array  
Update requires: No interruption

CreatedAt.description: The timestamp when the service was created.
CreatedAt.markdownDescription:
The timestamp when the service was created.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

UpdatedAt.description: The timestamp when the service was last updated.
UpdatedAt.markdownDescription:
The timestamp when the service was last updated.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

KmsKeyId.description: The KMS key ID for encrypting service data.
KmsKeyId.markdownDescription:
The KMS key ID for encrypting service data.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 1  
Maximum Length: 2048  
Pattern: ^((arn:aws(-[^:]+)?:kms:[a-zA-Z0-9-]*:[0-9]{12}:((key/[a-zA-Z0-9-]{36})|(alias/[a-zA-Z0-9-_/]+)))|([a-zA-Z0-9-]{36})|(alias/[a-zA-Z0-9-_/]+))$  
Update requires: Replacement

SystemArn.markdownDescription:
The system ARN.

---

Required: Yes  
Type: String  
Pattern: ^arn:(aws|aws-cn|aws-iso|aws-iso-[a-z]{1}|aws-us-gov):[A-Za-z0-9][A-Za-z0-9_/.-]{0,62}:([a-z]{2}-((iso[a-z]{0,1}-)|(gov-)){0,1}[a-z]+-[0-9]):[0-9]{12}:[A-Za-z0-9/][A-Za-z0-9:_/+.-]{0,1023}$  
Update requires: No interruption

UserJourneyIds.description: User journey IDs associated with this system.

items.markdownDescription:
---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Pattern: ^\S{1,255}$  
Update requires: No interruption

UserJourneyIds.markdownDescription:
User journey IDs associated with this system.

---

Required: No  
Type: Array  
Update requires: No interruption

AssociatedSystem.markdownDescription:
---

Required: No  
Update requires: No interruption

CrossAccountRoleArn.description: ARN of the cross-account IAM role.
CrossAccountRoleArn.markdownDescription:
ARN of the cross-account IAM role.

---

Required: Yes  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 20  
Maximum Length: 2048  
Pattern: ^arn:(aws|aws-cn|aws-iso|aws-iso-[a-z]{1}|aws-us-gov):iam::[0-9]{12}:role\/(([^\/][\x21-\x7E]+\/){1,511})?[A-Za-z0-9_+=,.@-]{1,64}$  
Update requires: No interruption

ExternalId.markdownDescription:
External ID for cross-account access.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Update requires: No interruption

CrossAccountRoleConfiguration.markdownDescription:
---

Required: No  
Update requires: No interruption

InvokerRoleName.description: Name of the invoker IAM role.
InvokerRoleName.markdownDescription:
Name of the invoker IAM role.

---

Required: Yes  
Type: String  
Pattern: ^[A-Za-z0-9_+=,.@\-]{1,64}$  
Update requires: No interruption

---

Required: No  
Type: Array  
Update requires: No interruption

---

BucketPath.description: S3 bucket path where reports will be written.
BucketPath.markdownDescription:
S3 bucket path where reports will be written.

---

Required: Yes  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 3  
Maximum Length: 512  
Pattern: ^(s3://)?[a-z0-9][a-z0-9.-]{1,61}[a-z0-9](/.*)?$  
Update requires: No interruption

BucketOwner.description: Account ID of the bucket owner.
BucketOwner.markdownDescription:
Account ID of the bucket owner.

---

Required: Yes  
Type: String  
Pattern: ^\d{12}$  
Update requires: No interruption
